summary: Iteration 116: Verified 5 bug fixes - FitPage Add to Cart, DinePage date restriction, MiraAI mobile positioning, Footer explainer link, MemberDashboard event listener. All fixes confirmed working.

verified_features.feature: FitPage - Add to Cart button on fitness bundles
verified_features.details: Found 5 Add to Cart buttons with data-testid='add-bundle-{id}'. onClick handler uses addToCart from useCart context. Toast notification appears after clicking. Code verified at line 926-943.
Date input has min attribute set to today's date (2026-01-29). Prevents selecting past dates. Code verified at line 1647 with min={new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]}.
Chat container has top-[60px] class for mobile viewport. Computed style shows top: 60px. Prevents chat from being hidden behind header on mobile. Code verified at line 575.

verified_features.feature: Footer - How Pet Soul Works explainer link
verified_features.details: Button with text '▶️ How Pet Soul™ Works' found in footer. onClick dispatches 'openSoulExplainer' custom event. Code verified at lines 124-129.

useEffect hook at lines 286-291 adds event listener for 'openSoulExplainer' event. Handler calls setShowSoulExplainer(true) to open the explainer video modal. Cleanup function removes listener on unmount.

critical_code_review_comments: All 5 bug fixes are correctly implemented
FitPage Add to Cart uses addToCart from useCart context with proper toast feedback
DinePage date input prevents past dates with dynamic min attribute
MiraAI mobile chat positioning uses top-[60px] to account for header
Footer and MemberDashboard properly communicate via custom event for explainer video
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 bug fixes from iteration 116 verified: 1) FitPage Add to Cart works with toast notification, 2) DinePage reservation date prevents past dates, 3) MiraAI chat has correct mobile positioning (top-[60px]), 4) Footer has 'How Pet Soul Works' button that dispatches event, 5) MemberDashboard listens for openSoulExplainer event to show video modal.
